key_requirements: R1: PostgreSQL adapter with save_message/get_messages/clear_history — test pattern mirrors Redis/Ion backend test structure for cclab-queue backends
R2: Redis adapter for high-performance temporary storage — directly mirrors RedisBackend and RedisRevocationStore which need integration tests
R3: Thread-safe persistence from multiple agent instances — parallels worker concurrency tests needed for ratelimit and revocation stores
R2: MemoryStorage implementation — analogous to InMemoryRevocationStore and MemorySchedulerBackend unit test patterns (isolation, independence)
R3: FileStorage implementation — acceptance criteria (save/reload across restarts) maps to IonBackend and IonSchedulerBackend persistence tests
R4: Session serialization format — drives serde round-trip test requirements for TaskMessage, TaskResult, TaskState, and WorkflowMeta structs

R4: Execution loop with max_turns limit — provides acceptance-criteria template ('GIVEN agent with limit, WHEN exceeded, THEN error returned') applicable to worker max-retries and rate-limit exhaustion tests
Scenario: Max turns reached — maps to RetryPolicy::max_retries test and TokenBucket exhaustion scenarios
R3: Execution pause state — parallels task revocation mid-execution and worker graceful shutdown signal test requirements
Scenario: Save and load message history — drives MemorySchedulerBackend state-persistence unit test structure
